ValidationRule.description: Only System Admins and users with the CF Postponed Approver permission set should be allowed to review postponement requests
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.ProfileId = '00e1I000001rqxtQAA'), NOT( $Permission.Combined_Funnel_SaaS_Postponement_Approver ), OR( ISCHANGED(SaaS_Postponed_Approval_Status__c), ISCHANGED( SaaS_Postponed_Review_Date__c), ISCHANGED(SaaS_Postponed_Approval_Comments__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You do not have permission to approve SaaS Postponement requests
